reviews.comment:
Tiene un lindo espacio al aire libre para descansar antes de atacar la Ruta del Desierto (o para hacerlo después de sufrirla)

(Translated by Google)
It has a nice outdoor space to rest before attacking the Desert Route (or to do so after suffering it)
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCMDliRXl3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Un desastre, la atención es pésima, a la ida estaba cerrado por un "problema del sistema" a la vuelta no tenía súper, me enteré en el surtidor.

(Translated by Google)
A disaster, the service is terrible, on the way there it was closed due to a "system problem" on the way back they didn't have any supermarket, I found out at the pump.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCNC1hWER3EAE

reviews.comment:
Falta personal en época pico de Enero. Se tarda hasta 1 hora paga cargar NAFTA. Falta atención. Buenos modales.

(Translated by Google)
Staff shortages during peak season in January. It takes up to an hour to pay for gas. Lack of customer service. Lack of manners.

reviews.comment:
Mejoró mucho. Le falta todavía. Agregaron WiFi para el pago QR en los surtidores, que antes no había. Siempre tiene gente, así que ir con paciencia. Parada obligada para muchos. Baños correctos. Precios del kiosco/bar elevados.

(Translated by Google)
It's improved a lot. It still needs some work. They added Wi-Fi for QR payment at the pumps, which wasn't available before. It's always busy, so be patient. A must-stop for many. Restrooms are adequate. Prices at the kiosk/bar are high.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCN3BpMXRRRRAB
